programme.desc: Seth and team discuss the state of the watch market and who's wearing what.

programme.desc: A documentary that could save your life!

programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: A Prayer For Compassion
programme.desc: An inspirational documentary about the importance of expanding your circle of compassion in life.

programme.title: The Human Experiment
programme.desc: A riveting documentary about chemicals being poured into our lives in various ways.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep301: Wakeboarding at Moomba Masters, L30 Offshore Sailing, and Surf Games Highlights
programme.desc: Coming up this week, we return to Australia for another report from the Moomba Masters and this week we look at the wakeboarding. We'll take you to Italy with coverage of the L30 Offshore Mixed Europeans. But first we'll take you to Austria for highlights from the Surf Games.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep108: La Paz Loreto, Mexico
programme.desc: Highlights include kayaking the Sea of Cortez, a tour of Loreto, kitesurfing, Bismark Cito, Costabaja Resort, nightlife, plus a tour of La Paz as well as local music.

programme.title: Sharks of the Coral Canyon
programme.desc: Sharks of the Coral Canyon highlights how sharks and coral reefs are intricately linked. The film features first-time-ever footage of sharks hunting at night, as well as new shark hunting behavior. Corals and sharks depend on one another, and must be protected together if either of them is to survive into the future.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: GameChanger Charity...Fishing for a Cause!
programme.desc: Championing the GameChanger charity with Brad Paisley and fly fishing with NFL celebrity Ryan Leaf to help educate students about opioid abuse.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep105: Tiger Sharks + Sharks and the Remora Fish + Shark Eyesight
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas, showcases a unique relationship between Sharks and the Remora Fish, and takes a Deeper Dive with a focus on Lemon Sharks, Tiger Sharks and Shark Eyesight.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep105
programme.desc: Liquid Edge paddles into wild whitewater via an epic mission to the Amazon; surfs the North Shore of Hawaii as well as the coldwater of Scotland; profiles a young grom making waves in the Pro Wakeboard Tour; and tours Trestles where Kelly and John work their slash.

programme.title: Blue World Ep701: Giant Cuttlefish in South Australia + Blue Grotto Sinkhole in Florida
programme.desc: In South Australia, we witness a Giant Cuttlefish spawning event, where thousands of Giant Australian Cuttlefish gather in the world’s largest cuttlefish aggregation. Then we explore Florida's Blue Grotto, a sinkhole with amazing underwater visibility and a mysterious cave.

programme.title: Xplash Ep105
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode, we’ll visit Bandon, Oregon to check out the creation of a sandy labyrinth; ride on the Billabong Clipper to surf remote locations around the globe; and get a taste of the multi-sport party known as the Swatch Free-4-Style.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep131
programme.desc: This World of Watersports episode features the Adidas Sickline Extreme Kayaking World Championships in Austria, the World Kiteboarding League World Cup in Leucate, France, and world-class Catamaran Racing in Palma De Mallorca, Spain.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Hillside Project - Prototyping in Mayrhofen
programme.desc: This past year, Louif Paradis and Harrison Gordon visited Wolle’s hometown of Mayrhofen to better understand the complex prototyping process and to see where Wolle carved his teeth as a snowboarder and a shaper. Filmed by David Vladyka Riding: Wolle Nyvelt Harrison Gordon Louif Paradis Victor Daviet

programme.title: Hillside Project - Rizumu
programme.desc: An intergenerational exploration of Japan in search of rhythm, flow, and incredibly deep snow. Each year Wolle Nyvelt and a select crew of snowboarders set out to explore new terrain and test different shapes within the Hillside Project Series. After being closed to travel for the last couple of years, Japan was the obvious choice. Needless to say, the crew composed of Wolle, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis and Luke Lund scored. Featuring: Wolle Nyvelt, Takaharu Nakai, Louif Paradis, Luke Lund Filmed by David Vladyka

programme.title: Hillside Project - Äsmo Factory
programme.desc: Making boards at the Äsmo factory! Featuring Josh Dirksen, Max Buri and Wolfgang Nyvelt

programme.title: Homegrown Hunter TV

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

They have at stake the Rolex Grand Slam of Show Jumping and a spot at the hall of fame. Relive the best moments of the 2019 edition of the CHI de Genève.

programme.desc: With the Bentayga, Bentley introduced the first SUV in the brand's 100-year history. Range Rover took a different approach with the Evoque Cabriolet: they offered a convertible option for their SUV model. And: the Mercedes AMG GLE coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German company Performmaster upgraded the Mercedes C63 AMG S, chip tuning from the Racechip company gave the Porsche Macan Turbo even more bite and Kellener did their take on the BMW 640i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche GT3 RS bears a very special wing on its back. Also: the Mercedes-AMG GT S provides understatement and power at the same time. And: the even more uncompromising Radical RX C Turbo.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the brand's first SUV model. And: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 50 years the Porsche 911 has been holding the crown as one of the best sports cars in the world. Two manufacturers recently jousted with the 911, with the Jaguar F-Type R and the Mercedes AMG GT S as Porsche’s rivals.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Preview
programme.desc: Since it was first set up back in 2014, the GC32 Racing Tour has become one of the most sought after for those who enjoy sailing at its finest and fastest. The 2021’s season again proved why the world’s top professional and amateurs love this tour!After a challenging 2020, when the Tour was cancelled, it finally returned better than ever and made 2021 a year to remember. Through the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast one design foiling catamarans.The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high when the owner-driver and commercially-backed professional teams were about to hit again the water and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. So let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Reel Nightmare: Book of Nightmare
programme.desc: Three beautiful, vengeful witches awakened by an ancient book, the Necronomicon, bring production of a film in their old family home to a deadly halt.

programme.title: False River
programme.desc: Three lunatics escape from a mental institution only to find the real world is crazier than they ever were.

programme.title: American Terror Story
programme.desc: This is supernatural horror in the vein of "The Grudge" and "The Ring". The ghost of a young asian girl who committed suicide a century ago is awakened by a group of college students, who fall victim to their own suicides under her spell.

programme.title: Almost Invisible
programme.desc: Be captured by the Invisible. To ease the weight of their college workload, unsuspecting teenagers seize the opportunity to to turn their end-of-the-summer party, into a sick, house wrecking.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E11 - Royal Children Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E04 - Elizabeth At 80 Continuity And Change
programme.desc: Thanks to the Queen’s dedication, Britain found a way to move past its empire days and create a successful new identity, surprising many experts. This is the story of an amazing woman and her amazing life.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E09 - Darkness
programme.desc: Pakistan/Texas Pt2. Jim continues his hunt through extremely dangerous but also beautiful areas of Pakistan.

programme.title: Wardens - S09:E09 - Buck Warrant and ORV Stickers
programme.desc: In Michigan, officers from District 7 handle cases involving people fishing without licenses and boats that aren't registered. Plus, a conservation officer in the Upper Peninsula looks into an off-road vehicle missing its required stickers.

programme.title: Wardens - S09:E10 - Michigan Elk
programme.desc: In District 3, Michigan conservation officers are looking into a case where a bull elk was shot using a tag meant for a cow. They're also checking out another elk that was taken on private land without the owner's okay.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E09 - Naturally Spiritual
programme.desc: In this episode we visit two different corners of our planet. Although thousands of kilometres apart, spiritually they are close relatives. First, Ethiopia in East Africa which is dissected by the Great African Rift Valley and considered by many to be the cradle of humankind. Next, a paradise on Earth: Jamaica.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E10 - Naturally Resilient
programme.desc: Today‘s journey in search of more miracles of nature brings us to the Masurian Lake District which is an impressive water world in north-eastern Poland. We will then trade in the cool Baltic region for tropical Caribbean. Here we will prove that it would be wrong to link the Cuban province of Guantanamo only with the famous American naval base. To wrap things up, we will return to Europe’s Mediterranean region to visit people of the Lipari Islands who continue to survive in the shade of ever-smouldering volcanoes.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E01 - Chiang Mai and Eze
programme.desc: Nestled in the foothills of northern Thailand, Chiang Mai is the country’s fifth largest city. Brimming with culture, beautiful architecture and stunning temples it’s often considered a sanctuary away from Bangkok. In the South of France, nestled between Nice and Monte Carlo is the picture postcard town of Eze.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E02 - Ice Hotel, Sweden and Bangkok
programme.desc: Ever fancied spending a night in the Ice hotel? We visit the breath-taking man-made winter wonderland and have a look at the arctic activities which guests can enjoy during their stay in Sweden. Then it’s off to warmer climates to Thailand’s capital – Bangkok.

programme.title: MansFeld
programme.desc: A magical film about the mysteries of childhood and an old custom: In the village of MANSFELD, the ritual banishment of the old takes place every year
Marc is a surfer and lives his life one day at a time. But after many strokes of fate, he dreams of turning back time, and starting all over again.

programme.title: In Your Arms
programme.desc: The poetic tale of a man with a neurological disorder and the enigmatic nurse persuaded to support him with assisted suicide.

programme.title: Name Me
programme.desc: An adeptly played debut in which a yearning for paternal affection plays out against a background of teenage sexual manipulation.

programme.title: One Ticket Please
programme.desc: A monument for one of New Yorks most singular theater enthusiast.

programme.title: In The Future They Ate From The Finest Porcelain
programme.desc: In a temporal twist, this movie tells the story of an intervention into the future perception of a territory’s political history.

programme.title: Solomon's Stone
programme.desc: Black-comedy short SOLOMON'S STONE, directed by Ramzi Maqdisi, is adapted from the novel Blue Light by Hussein Barghouty.

programme.title: Clumsy Little Acts of Tenderness
programme.desc: The Finnish short comedy by Miia Tervo portrays an anything but typical relationship between a loving father and his skeptical daughter.

programme.title: Grimm’s Cuckoo
programme.desc: This short film dares a slightly different view of life in a psychiatric clinic. Screened at Cannes Short Film Corner and Interfilm Berlin.

programme.title: Oh Yeah, She Performs
programme.desc: A doc about four extraordinary women pursuing the same dream: composing, producing and living from their own music, without compromising their ideals

programme.title: Solo - Out of a Dream
programme.desc: Dutch director Jos de Putter once again follows 31-year-old soccer star Leonardo Santiago in the favelas of Rio de Janeiro.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Dream Called Death
programme.desc: An introvert and Schizophrenic young man finds the "Perfect Cure" to his mental illness in the form of a damsel whom he considers to be the "Woman of his dream," but his dream somewhat turns out to be a nightmare for him and everyone around him!

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: Fiona decides to make it a good day by being kind to everyone in her life.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Gemma gives Rhyme a fake ID. TK and Wes hold auditions for their upcoming movie project.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Ellie gets an unexpected visitor. Rooney has a difficult conversation. Rhyme has a few choice words for Sadie.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Mani assembles the crew. Mr. Mioshi tells his origin story and gives a tour of the Jitterbug factory.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Dylan, Goth Girl, Hank, and Paige compete to win the Jitterbug empire.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Mani is back! The girls deal with boy drama, while Mani confronts his own theatrics.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Tensions between Sky and Harmony boil over onstage as the school play concludes.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Will Lizzy and Co. be able to unmask the culprit, or will it be curtains for the theater department?

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: It's dress rehearsal for the Crown Lake drama club, and one student becomes the victim of a tragic accident.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: Nellie and Josh hit it off until she learns about long-standing and controversial rule during Treasure Hunt.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets several members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water?

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: Queen’s University is hosting the 2023 and 2024 Vanier Cup Championship and the Gaels have their sights set on the Cup.

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The 2023 Gaels look to take back control of this decades-long battle. Legendary Coach Frank Tindall is one of the greatest of all time.

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The Gaels embark on an ambitious mission. One of Canada’s most prominent surgeons lead his team to the 1978 Vanier Cup.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: GeneproDX is transforming traditional medicine —bridging Health Tech and AI and providing patients with fast, reliable, and accurate diagnostics. GeneproDX’s patented product, ThyroidPrint, provides highly-accurate diagnosis, resulting in fewer unnecessary surgeries — saving patients from life-altering surgical outcomes.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Far UV creates autonomous disinfection devices that can assist in containing the inevitable emergence of infectious diseases that can be spread by pathogens on surfaces or through the air. It is under contract with NASA to prevent foodborne illness in space flight and works with the US Army.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E11 - Episode 11
programme.desc: Petra is quickly reminded that every choice comes with its costs. As Dineo and Felicity square up for a vicious battle, Lexi and Elizabeth are forced to pick sides.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E03 - Episode 03
programme.desc: After something terrible happens, Felicity cooks up a lie that protects her siblings.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: When Andy’s ride-sharing plans are derailed, Stefan steps up and presents a new opportunity for both of them. Lexi is questioned by the police, but the lies and guilt are about to overwhelm her.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E05 - Episode 05
programme.desc: Felicity scrambles to find out why charges against Sefako have been reinstated while Sefako confesses to the murder, and Lexi teeters on the edge.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E06 - Episode 06
programme.desc: Angelique lays a trap for Msizi that someone discovers. A celebratory supper at the Potgieters is interrupted by shocking news.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E07 - Episode 07
programme.desc: After Dineo’s betrayal, the three sisters finally face the consequences of their secrets. As pressure mounts, the sisters’ relationship starts to fracture.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E08 - Episode 08
programme.desc: The Potgieters reel in the wake of the tragedy, and as blame and acrimony begin to swirl, Petra comes to a realisation. Gordon puts his pride on the line to broker the peace between his family.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Long John Silver's Return to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Long John Silver rescues his friend Jim from rival pirates and risks all for hidden treasure in this colorful swashbuckling sequel.

icon.src: https://d1ci3apo8cxilc.cloudfront.net/NYX-STARLIGHT-ENG/videos/posters/LONG JOHN SILVER'S RETURN TO TREASURE ISLAND_1920x1080_EN.png

programme.title: The Steel Claw
programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: A Quaker colony tries to save the giant sequoias from a timber baron

programme.title: A Star is born
programme.desc: A film star helps a young singer and actress find fame, even as age and alcoholism send his own career on a downward spiral

programme.title: The Strange love of Martha Ivers
programme.desc: A man is reunited with his childhood friend and her husband, who believe he knows the truth about the death of her rich aunt years earlier

programme.title: All Those Times You Didn’t See
programme.desc: The efforts you make when no one’s watching are the ones God uses to shape you. Just because you don't see the outcome yet doesn’t mean He’s ignoring you; He's positioning you. Keep showing up while you wait.

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: The God Of Pieces
programme.desc: The devil wants to keep you overwhelmed by your situation, but God wants to show you how to deal with it piece by piece. And as you learn to praise God for the piece you have, you’ll experience the peace you’ve been praying for.

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through
programme.desc: When despair sets in, it’s easy to assume it’ll always be this way. But what if a shift in thinking could break that cycle? Your thoughts have the power to disrupt your despair, especially when you stop focusing on what happened and start trusting the God who never left you.

programme.title: SO BE IT [Full Album]
programme.desc: The official live video for "SO BE IT" by Elevation Worship featuring Tiffany Hudson Chris Brown.

programme.title: The Hardest Part Is Behind You
programme.desc: Don’t judge any one part of your life in isolation or let unmet expectations define your future. God’s not finished with your story, and He didn’t bring you this far to let you turn back now.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila is happy because her mother is finally free, but Max is still hesitant. Reunited, she wants to know why he abandoned her and the woman pretends not to remember those painful moments. He abandons her for the second time. It is a very strong blow.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max is disappointed by the meeting between Ezequiel and Camila. In this moment of depression Astrid tries to become his good friend, but he rejects her. Camila looks for Max, is sad and gives him the reason: that woman is not her mother.

programme.title: Abigail - S01:E006 - Episode 6
programme.desc: Carlos Alfredo hints to María Clara that he would like to marry her. Guillermo threatens Estrella with death if she tries to tell Abigail that she is her mother. Carlos Alfredo tells his mother that he wants to start a family with María Clara.

programme.title: Abigail - S01:E007 - Abigail Refuses to Travel
programme.desc: Abigail refuses to travel to Europe with her father. Bertha demands Carlos Alfredo not to marry María Clara. Upon seeing them at school, Ana Leónidas confronts Estrella and Rita because she believes they have confessed to Abigail who her mother is.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Malena knows she must return home to avoid losing her son. Pedro instructs Cheo to liquidate Lorena; without hurting Alberto. Ricardo is still not sure which of the Marias is the swindler. Lorena kisses Alberto goodbye and Cheo is close by, waiting for the right moment to dissipate.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo catches up with Cheo and kills him; he is now pointing at Alberto and Lorena – Gunshots are heard in the house. Gertrudis remembers that Alberto was with her and feels like dying thinking something happened to her son. María Bonita suspects that Ricardo is homosexual. Malena provokes Pablo's anger.

programme.title: TODOS PODEMOS VIAJAR
programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.title: DRIVING
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Esperanza, sabe sobre Rosa Blanco. Gregorio y Julia, fingen ante la familia, pero continúan encontrándose. Los Aragón siempre en guerra por la muerte de Marcos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max piensa que Camila lo rechazó por Roberto. En confesión con el Padre Tiziano, le aconseja que le cuente toda la verdad a Max, pero ella teme que Roberto la denuncie por asesina. Julia y Gregorio vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila es atropellada por un desconocido que le advierte que deje de buscar a Rosa Blanco. Esto la inquieta y acude a Max pero el le dice que no lo involucre más en este asunto. Todos temen el regreso de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: amila y Max visitan en la cárcel a otra Rosa Blanco. La mujer le confirma que tuvo una hija hembra y casi la convence. Max cree que miente para aprovechar la situación.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en que la mujer presa es su mamá y la Madre Isabel le dice que Rosa Blanco, presa por asesinar a un hombre, no es su madre. El destino entrelaza a las familias en guerra. Buscan identidad de “El Doliente”

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: ¡Ni Te Me Acerques!
programme.desc: Él solo tenía que cuidar el hotel y teclear su novela, como Jack Nicholson en “El Resplandor”, pero de buen rollo. Y Llega la cuarentena y se queda le pilla en el Hotel Balneario de Ariño haciendo frente a la paranoia general, el acoso de las fuerzas del orden, las videollamadas de su novia, su madre y del conspiranoico Javi... Todos nos aburrimos mucho en el primer confinamiento. Juan no.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.
